name: Egg Nog
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg yolks until thick and pale yellow.
2. Gradually add sugar to the yolks, beating constantly.
3. Add milk and 1 quart of heavy cream, mixing well.
4. Stir in bourbon, rum, and cognac into the mixture.
5. In a separate bowl, beat the remaining heavy cream and egg whites until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the beaten egg whites and heavy cream into the main mixture.
7. Sprinkle nutmeg on top for garnish.
Makes 4 1/2 litres.
